use_codes.desc: A METHOD FOR IMPROVING GLYCEMIC CONTROL IN ADULTS WITH TYPE 2 DIABETES MELLITUS

METHOD OF REDUCING THE RISK OF CARDIOVASCULAR DEATH, NON-FATAL MYOCARDIAL INFARCTION, AND/OR NON-FATAL STROKE IN ADULTS WITH TYPE 2 DIABETES MELLITUS AND ESTABLISHED CARDIOVASCULAR DISEASE BY ADMINISTERING LIRAGLUTIDE
